formulas.formula:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Charlemagne's Three Orders",
    "formula": "Three Orders: Clergy, Nobility, and Commoners",
    "variables": "No variables/symbols, just a hierarchical structure",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "These orders were the social hierarchy during the Carolingian Renaissance"
  },
  {
    "name": "Feudalism Pyramid",
    "formula": "King at the top, followed by Nobles, Vassals, and Serfs",
    "variables": "No variables/symbols, just a hierarchical structure",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "This pyramid represents the feudal system with the king at the top and the serfs at the bottom"
  },
  {
    "name": "Manorialism",
    "formula": "Lord (Noble) at the top, followed by Serfs and Villeins",
    "variables": "No variables/symbols, just a hierarchical structure",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "This is a self-sufficient economic unit where the lord owned the land and the serfs worked to maintain it"
  },
  {
    "name": "Vassal-Vassal Relationship",
    "formula": "Mutual Obligations: Military Service and Protection",
    "variables": "No variables/symbols, just a relationship between two parties",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "This relationship was based on mutual obligations where the vassal provided military service and the lord provided protection"
  },
  {
    "name": "The Obligations of Feudalism",
    "formula": "Military Service, Protection, and Homage",
    "variables": "No variables/symbols, just a list of obligations",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "These obligations were the foundation of the feudal system and were required of all vassals"
  },
  {
    "name": "The Structure of the Manor",
    "formula": "Lord, Villeins, and Serfs",
    "variables": "No variables/symbols, just a hierarchical structure",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "This structure represents the social hierarchy of the manor"
  }
]
```

Note: Since the chapter "The Three Orders" primarily discusses social hierarchies and feudal relationships, there are no mathematical formulas to include. The above JSON array includes key statements and laws related to the three orders and feudalism.
